## Topic

## Provenance (required)

- [ ] ✅ **Reported** — I (or a public source) actually saw this in a loop. **Source URL / company / date:**
- [ ] 🔮 **Representative** — plausible and on-distribution, but not a verbatim reported question.

> We only ship "Reported" questions with a checkable source. No source → it becomes 🔮 Representative.

## Difficulty

- [ ] 🟢 Easy  · [ ] 🟡 Medium  · [ ] 🔴 Hard

## Suggested answer / rubric (optional but appreciated)

<!-- For MCQ-style entries, give the options and a one-line "why" for each. For open questions, give the 60–90s senior answer. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing questions and this isn't a duplicate.
- [ ] The question is about the **AI Engineer** loop (LLM apps, RAG, agents, evals, LLMOps, fine-tuning, system design).
- [ ] I labeled provenance honestly.
